/**
 * @brief adds a and b and returns the result.
 * @param a the a
 * @param b the b
 * @return int the computed result
 */
/**
 * @brief process_buffers buffer and size and returns the result.
 * @param buffer the buffer
 * @param size   the size value
 * @return void the void result
 */
/**
 * @brief divides dividend and divisor and returns the result.
 * @param dividend the dividend value
 * @param divisor  the divisor value
 * @return int the computed result
 */
